variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists, so selected only that row per hierarchy rule. Did not add labor component to avoid double counting. Did not add any R&D row because no dedicated R&D expense line is reported above EBIT.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; supplemental and below operating profit sections.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Indicates SG&A excludes R&D but is not itself an R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance-sheet accumulated amortization, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated income-statement research and development expense line is present. The only R&D-related line is amortization of capitalized R&D, which is not current-period R&D expense for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct interest expense line.
